title: Party Status
description: Contents of ψ/memory/collaborations/parties/<topic-slug>.json. Represents one active /work-with party. Ratified 3/3 on maw-js#332 (mawui/mawjs/skills-cli). Consumed by the xyflow CollaborationMesh UI (maw-ui federation_2d) — see issue #235. Do not modify field names without re-ratification; add new optional fields instead (Nothing is Deleted).

topic.description: Human-readable topic (also the slug basis for the filename).

anchor.description: GitHub anchor issue reference (e.g. 'maw-js#332'). Empty string when no anchor.

anchorUrl.description: Full URL to the anchor issue. Empty string when no anchor.

leader.description: Leader is always human (Rule 6). Oracle is never leader.

actingVia.description: Which oracle the human is currently working through (e.g. 'skills-cli-oracle').

members.description: Oracles that have accepted and are currently in the party.

pendingInvites.description: Invites that have not reached a terminal ACCEPT/REJECT state.

created.description: ISO8601 UTC when the party was organized.

lastActivity.description: ISO8601 UTC of the most recent party activity (invite, sync, tell, ...). Mesh UI uses this to sort + fade dormant parties.

team.description: Optional lightweight team tag. Null or absent when the party is not tied to a declared team. See issue #233 (auto-broadcast tiers).

node.description: Fleet node the oracle lives on (e.g. 'oracle-world', 'white').

status.description: Presence state. See SKILL.md § Presence States. Drives mesh node styling.

role.description: Party role. 'leader' is never valid — leader is human, lives on PartyStatus.leader.

syncScore.description: RAW score at lastSync (THIS topic only, party-scoped). Decay is applied on read, never stored.

decayedScore.description: DERIVED on read via decay(syncScore, lastSync, λ). Schema retains the field for compatibility (Nothing is Deleted), but any value here should be treated as informational only — recompute before rendering. See issue #239.

overallTrust.description: Optional rolled-up β trust across all parties with this oracle (see § Trust Model). Fleet-scope; party-scope uses α (the `trust` field).

lastSync.description: ISO8601 UTC of last confirmed sync. Drives decay + 'Last' column.

trust.description: Party-scoped (α) trust tier. Mesh UI uses this to pick edge style (solid/dashed).

joinedAt.description: ISO8601 UTC when the oracle accepted the invite.

decay_lambda.description: Party-level λ override. Wins over trust-tier defaults (see SKILL.md § Sync Decay).

accept_threshold.description: Below this decayed score = out of sync. Default 0.7.

kick_threshold.description: Below this decayed score = flagged stale (never auto-kick — human decides). Default 0.3.

broadcast_scope.description: Default scope for /work-with tell in this party.

divergence_tolerance.description: Default 'high' (anti-groupthink). Low scores should not auto-remediate.

presence_notifications.description: How loudly the party surfaces presence changes.

invitedAt.description: ISO8601 UTC when the invite was sent.

invitedBy.description: Oracle that sent the invite (acting for the human leader).

status.description: Will be aligned to CommitPhase vocabulary in a follow-up refactor (see phase3-design.md).

expiresAt.description: Optional absolute expiry. Absent = no expiry.
